symptom_vector: JVM CPU spike, JVM CPU overload, JVM high CPU usage, JVM CPU saturation

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: Component [adservice] experienced [pod_cpu_usage] fault, accompanied by [adservice--stress] anomaly.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [adservice] (From Ground Truth)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [adservice--stress] in Log (From GT key_observations)
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [invocationtargetexception] in Log (From GT key_observations)
Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [transformlistener] in Log (From GT key_observations)
Step 5: Check Observation - Found keyword [pod_cpu_usage] in Metric (From GT key_observations)
Step 6: Check Observation - Found keyword [rrt] and [rrt_max] in Metric (From GT key_observations)
Step 7: Derive Root Cause - Based on above features, determined cause is [pod_cpu_usage] (From Ground Truth)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Byteman agent stress injection logs with AdService--stress-1749913849 rules appear in adservice pods
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'AdService--stress' in logs from adservice pods (adservice-0, adservice-1, adservice-2)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Exception in thread "Attach Listener" java.lang.reflect.InvocationTargetException appears in adservice-1 logs
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'InvocationTargetException' in adservice logs

critical_checks.expected_pattern: org.jboss.byteman.agent.Transformer logs appear in adservice pods
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'Transformer' in adservice logs (appears in context of Byteman agent transformation)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: pod_cpu_usage median increased from 0.0 to 0.6 (200% change) for all adservice pods
critical_checks.instruction: Check if metric [pod_cpu_usage] shows significant increase for adservice pods during anomaly period

critical_checks.expected_pattern: rrt median increased from 3225.93 to 13403.61 (122.4% change) for adservice-1
critical_checks.instruction: Check if metric [rrt] shows degradation for adservice pods

critical_checks.expected_pattern: rrt_max median increased from 42246.0 to 130879.0 (102.39% change) for adservice-1
critical_checks.instruction: Check if metric [rrt_max] shows extreme degradation for adservice pods
